feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Rewrite Your History
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,995Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 101

Summary: It was definitely not possible for Scott to have just said those words. "What?" Stiles asked again, because what else was he supposed to do? It wasn't possible. It just wasn't. "I said I don't think I can handle your fragile self anymore," Scott repeated. "You complain about everything. Everything hurts you. I don't know what to do anymore. Everything in this world will continue to hurt you. You can't protect yourself, so I'm always down a hand, because someone constantly has to be on 'Stiles duty.' You need to be babysat, and I can't afford to lose someone every time there's a threat in this city, because it happens a lot. And you keep putting yourself at risk. I don't know how to deal with this anymore. It's getting tiring."

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Case Study in Vulnerability
entry.summary:
Author: thegirlwithnofreckles

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,741Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 15

Summary: So on a work night Stiles, saw a guy die, held him while dying, learned his crush had a fated mate somewhere, heard Deaton make a joke, and somehow the most surprising thing was the latest.

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,364Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 56

Summary: (End season 2)   What happens when the most human person in the room is forced to carry something inhuman?   After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his stomach and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry.   .

entry.title: you just can't stop leaving, can you?
entry.summary:
Author: lonelyBoneflower

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,780Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 33

Summary: He was a stranger. Just some sullen guy we ran into in the woods while looking for the inhaler my best friend relied on as if it were his very lifeline. And then, one day, we stood side by side, as if it were the most natural thing in the world. Derek was a stranger, yet when he stood with us, it felt entirely natural. Perhaps, from the very beginning, my heart had recognized him as a man worthy of trust—even if my mind was much slower to catch up to that truth. After the events of the movie, Stiles returns to town. [Alternate story for Teen Wolf The Movie]

entry.title: Threshold of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: Infernos

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,876Chapters: 10/18Kudos: 8

Summary: The Druid Council needs Stiles's help. Eight hundred years ago, druids made a catastrophic mistake, creating Tairseach Folús, a dimensional entity that feeds on supernatural life force. After devastating losses, seventeen druids sacrificed themselves to create a prison outside of our reality where the entity would be contained forever. Seventy-five years ago, a rogue druid discovered records of the prison and relocated it, anchoring it to the ley lines beneath San Francisco, where it began to degrade. The Councils formed a coalition with other supernaturals to reinforce the seals, but in this reality, those seals won't last. Now, a vengeful hunter family has allied with the druid and his followers. They intend to shatter the prison during the autumn equinox, bind the monster to their will, and use it to systematically wipe out the supernaturals. Stiles has eighteen days to stop them and find a way to send Tairseach back where it came from, before it consumes every supernatural being on the West Coast...and beyond

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,565Chapters: 32/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. -------------------------------------------------------------- This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 66,199Chapters: 31/45Kudos: 62

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: So High School
entry.summary:
Author: CryingOverSeaweed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,655Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 116

Summary: Being the sheriff’s son with years of enduring unmedicated ADHD, Stiles Stilinski was a very observant person...So how did he manage to miss a certain werewolf basketball superstar sitting across the English classroom for an entire year? And why can’t he bring himself to look away? And why is he disappointed when he doesn’t look back?In which Stiles starts obsessing over a boy who seems to not know he exists and totally out of his league.

entry.title: Time After Time
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 54,346Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 721

Summary: Talia told Noah about werewolves and the supernatural when he was elected Sheriff. He warned her that was a mistake and she didn't understand why, until she realized that that meant ten year old Stiles knew about werewolves. God help them all. A soft and slow burn story about the Stilinskis finding out about the supernatural much earlier than in canon and what happens when you give Stiles wild magic, and Noah becomes an accidental human alpha.

entry.title: Obsessed
entry.summary:
Author: Almaie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,196Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Stiles Stilinski dies in an accident involving his boyfriend, Derek Hale. He is reborn and sent back nine years. To save his future self, he avoids Derek and his feelings for him. The problem is that Stiles has loved Derek for a long time and has written about him in his diary. While destroying the diary, Derek discovers a few pages, which piques his curiosity about Stiles. Will Stiles resist the love of the handsome man and save his future self, or will he fall for the same man twice and risk his life?

entry.title: By My Side
entry.summary:
Author: HyperDoctor11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,383Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Genevive Stilinski is no ordinary mundane as she was led to believe her entire life. She learns on her eighteenth birthday that she's half-Shadowhunter and half-Demon, a Warlock. Her mother's secret. All the legends are true. Gen happens to be one of those legends. Genevive doesn't expect her baby cousin, Clary Fray's, own eighteenth birthday to blow up in their faces when Jocelyn goes missing and the two of them are taken to a Shadowhunter Institute. Gen must come to an understanding within herself about who she is and whose side she is on. On thing is for certain. Genevive's life will never go back to the way it was before.

entry.title: Godzina Duchow
entry.summary:
Author: AgMercy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,285Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 64

Summary: Derek walks up to the little shop on the corner. It’s far more…cheery than he thought a witch’s apothecary would be. More like a green house. The walls are almost entirely glass—a stark contrast to the brick storefronts lining the street—and give full view of the plants bursting with life inside. The place is so packed with greenery that you can’t actually see anything else in the shop. It even spills out to the sidewalk, with lush ferns and brightly flowering bushes taking up half the space. Even the wooden sign hanging over the doorway has a blossoming clematis vine wrapped around it and covering half the words. The part of it he can read says Godzina in fine purple script. The peculiarity of the name is the only identifier that this is the place Deaton was asking him to go to. Knowing the older witch and how he liked to keep things under wraps, Derek is beginning to understand why he didn’t want to come himself.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: ’Til Your Shoulders Uncoil
entry.summary:
